emails.subject: TFS LOI
emails.body: TFS LOI Tana, Please send an LOI regarding Broker Client to Alan Kurzer of TFS Energy LLC (akurzer@tfsbrokers.com). The terms are as follows: Term: 1 year Commodities: North American Gas and US Power Price: $200,000/each or $300,000 for both Thanks, Dan
